items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG5452X, Omada:A network switch is a functional network unit connecting individual devices and other network elements. It is suitable for controlling network traffic. The TP-Link SG5452X, Omada SDN is supposed to be installed in a rack. This model impresses with a switching capacity of 176 Gb/s. The Switch is equipped with 48 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology allows data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 440 × 220 × 44mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology makes sure the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to set up end station priority. The switch weighs 3170g. The TP-Link SG5452X, Omada SDN also works on the ISO/OSI model network layer,  which means it may serve as a router. Thanks to this neat feature, you don't have to purchase another network element.
